summary: 'Your Week in Wax' feature testing - ALL TESTS PASSED (25 backend + all frontend flows). Complete weekly vinyl report replacing the old 'Taste Report'. All endpoints working, share card generating 1080x1080 PNG, no 'Taste Report' references remain in UI.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/wax-reports/generate creates full report with all required sections
Backend: GET /api/wax-reports/latest returns latest report for authenticated user
Backend: GET /api/wax-reports/latest/{username} returns public latest report (no auth)
Backend: GET /api/wax-reports/latest/{invalid_user} returns 404
Backend: GET /api/wax-reports/history returns list of past reports
Backend: GET /api/wax-reports/{report_id} returns specific report by ID
Backend: GET /api/wax-reports/{invalid_id} returns 404
Backend: POST /api/wax-reports/regenerate-label/{report_id} changes personality label
Backend: POST /api/wax-reports/regenerate-label/{report_id} second call returns 400 (already regenerated)
Backend: GET /api/wax-reports/{report_id}/share-card returns valid PNG (Content-Type: image/png)
Backend: Share card PNG is exactly 1080x1080 pixels
Backend: Share card endpoint requires auth
Backend: Share card for invalid report returns 404
Backend: Report contains personality with key and label
Backend: Report contains listening_stats with 6 required stats
Backend: Report contains collection_value with total_value, value_change, over_50/100/200 counts
Backend: Report contains wantlist_pulse with total, matches_found, longest_hunt_days, trending
Backend: Report contains social_stats with new_followers, total_posts, trades_completed
Backend: Report contains closing_line
Backend: Era breakdown has decade and percentage values
Backend: Top artists have artist name and spin counts
Backend: Top records have title, artist, cover_url, spin counts
Backend: Auth endpoints (latest, history, generate) require authentication
Frontend: /wax-reports page shows full report with header (username, avatar, date range)
Frontend: Header displays 'your week in wax' title
Frontend: Personality label card shown with italic text
Frontend: Reroll button present when label not yet regenerated
Frontend: Listening stats card with 6 stats (total spins, unique records, avg per record, longest day, most active day, time of day)
Frontend: Top artists ranked list with spin counts
Frontend: Top records with cover art and spin counts
Frontend: Era breakdown with percentage bars
Frontend: Collection value card with $amount, over $50/$100/$200 counts, most valuable record, hidden gem
Frontend: Wantlist pulse card with stats and trending record
Frontend: Social stats card with new followers, posts, trades, most liked post
Frontend: Closing line shown in italics
Frontend: 'Share your Week in Wax' button opens modal
Frontend: Share modal generates and displays 1080x1080 card
Frontend: Share modal has 'Save to Camera Roll' download button
Frontend: Share modal shows '1080 × 1080 · designed for Instagram' text
Frontend: 'view past reports' link navigates to /wax-reports/history
Frontend: /wax-reports/history page shows list of past reports with week ranges
Frontend: History cards show spins count and personality snippet
Frontend: Collection page has 'your week in wax' CTA (not 'Taste Report')
Frontend: Profile page shows pinned wax report below stats row
Frontend: Pinned report shows 'your week in wax' title
Frontend: No remaining references to 'Taste Report' in the UI (grep verified)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing demo user with existing report
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wax Reports ('Your Week in Wax') feature fully working. Backend endpoints at /api/wax-reports/*. Routes: generate, latest, latest/{username}, history, {report_id}, regenerate-label/{report_id}, {report_id}/share-card. Frontend pages: /wax-reports, /wax-reports/history, /wax-reports/:reportId. Share card is 1080x1080 PNG. Personality label can be regenerated once per report (label_regenerated flag). Report stored in wax_reports collection with user_id + week_start unique index. Weekly scheduler runs Sunday midnight UTC.

report_sections: listening_stats (total_spins, unique_records, avg_spins_per_record, longest_listening_day, most_active_day, most_active_time)
top_records (5 items with title, artist, cover_url, spins)
top_genres (conditional - shown if genre data exists)
mood_breakdown (conditional - shown if vinyl_mood posts exist)
collection_value (total_value, value_change, over_50, over_100, over_200, most_valuable, hidden_gem)

pages: /wax-reports - Full report view with all sections
ui_elements: Header with avatar, username, date range

taste_report_removal.verification: grep -r 'taste report' frontend/src/ returns no results
